revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Sources exist]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2503 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = Sources exist | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | type = content | image = [[File:Question book-new.svg|50x40px|alt=]] | issue = An editor has performed a search and found that '''[[WP:NEXIST|sufficient sources exist]]''' to establish the subject's [[WP:N|notability]]. | fix = Please help [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} improve this article] by [[Help:Referencing for beginners|adding citations to reliable sources]]. Unsourced material may be challenged and removed.{{#if:{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}|
{{find sources mainspace|{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{{find}}}|.}}|{{{find2|{{{unquoted|}}}}}}}} |{{#if:{{{find|}}}|{{#ifeq: {{{find|}}} |none ||
{{find sources mainspace|{{{find}}} }}}}|
{{find sources mainspace}}}} }} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing additional references | all = All articles needing additional references | removalnotice = yes }} }} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Ambox transclusions]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
